name: ouija
description: Agentic / RAG / MCP-server fuzzer with a data-flow success oracle. Points at a deployed AI application (chatbot+RAG, tool-using agent, or MCP server) and proves whether an attacker can make it do something it shouldn't.

tools.name: list_probes
tools.description: List ouija's probe families with their OWASP ASI/LLM mappings (safe, read-only).

tools.name: scan_mcp
tools.description: Fuzz a target MCP server: tool-poisoning (static lint + dynamic confirm), tool-result injection, rug-pull / definition drift, confused-deputy / OAuth, token passthrough, SSRF-in-discovery, excessive scope. Requires confirm=true and an allow-listed target.

tools.name: fuzz_agent
tools.description: Fuzz a tool-using agent for indirect prompt injection, excessive agency, and data exfiltration through permitted tools. Judged on observed tool-calls / OOB data-flow, not text. Requires confirm=true and an allow-listed target.

tools.name: scan_rag
tools.description: Fuzz a RAG pipeline for retrieval/memory poisoning and indirect injection: plant a document, retrieve it with a benign query, and confirm the data-flow effect (exfil / tool-call / answer-flip). Plants are retracted; cleanup is asserted. Requires confirm=true and an allow-listed target.
